pages.text: Beyond the core leveling system, Penchant's features are organized into $(#7A2FBF)modules$(), each shipped as a built-in datapack you can enable or disable independently.

$(bold)Configuring modules$()$(br)Toggle them in the $(#7A2FBF)Data Packs$() screen when creating a world, or later with the $(#7A2FBF)/datapack$() command. A menu mod such as Datapack/Gamerule Menus also works.$(br2)Some modules make more sense together; these soft recommendations are noted on each page.

pages.title: Data Packs
pages.text: Each Penchant module appears as its own datapack in the world creation screen.

$(italic)Enabled by default$()$(br)$(li)Table Rework $(li)Bookshelf Placement $(li)Durability Rework $(li)Loot Rework $(li)No Anvil Books $(li)Guaranteed Drops$(br2)$(italic)Off by default$()$(br)$(li)Reduced Curses $(li)Randomized Librarians
